name: Kaleyra CPaaS Messaging API
what_it_does: Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS) with REST API for SMS, voice, WhatsApp, RCS, and chat messaging — offering global coverage with strong presence in India, Europe, and US markets for enterprise-grade communication automation.
use_cases: Sending SMS OTPs and transactional messages to enterprise customers globally
Programmable voice calls for verification, notifications, and IVR workflows
WhatsApp Business messaging for customer engagement and support
RCS (Rich Communication Services) messaging for enhanced mobile experiences
Multi-channel communication orchestration from a single unified API
not_for: Budget consumer SMS with cheapest per-message pricing
Developer-first experimental use cases (Kaleyra is enterprise-focused)
Teams needing extensive open-source SDK community and documentation
best_when: An enterprise team needs reliable multi-channel communication (SMS, voice, WhatsApp) with strong India/APAC and global coverage and compliance expertise.
avoid_when: You need developer-first APIs, the cheapest SMS rates, or primarily work in markets where Twilio/Vonage have stronger coverage.

auth.notes: API key from Kaleyra dashboard. Passed as api-key header or query parameter. Account-scoped access. Separate keys for test and production environments. SID and token combo for some endpoints.

pricing.paid_tiers: Pay-per-message; enterprise contracts available; pricing varies by channel and country
pricing.notes: Enterprise-focused pricing. Strong presence in India (acquired Bandyer for voice/video). Public company (NYSE: KLY). Enterprise SLAs and dedicated support available.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API covers SMS, voice, WhatsApp, and flow APIs. Multiple language SDKs available. Webhook support for delivery receipts and inbound messages. Documentation covers enterprise use cases.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Message sends create new messages. Delivery queries are idempotent reads. No idempotency key support — retry sends may result in duplicate messages.
known_agent_gotchas: India DLT compliance required for Indian enterprise SMS — sender registration mandatory
Voice API requires additional setup beyond SMS — separate credential management
WhatsApp requires Meta BSP approval — Kaleyra is an authorized BSP
Enterprise focus means less self-serve documentation than developer-first tools

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. API key auth. SOC2 and ISO 27001 certified. GDPR compliant. Multi-region data residency including India. Public company governance adds enterprise accountability.
